title: Agentic AI for Seismology Research: From Signal Detection to Scientific Workflows
subtitle: Applying agentic systems to earthquake science responsibly
description: How agentic AI can support seismology research workflows, from signal triage to reproducible scientific analysis.
excerpt: Seismology is becoming an AI-native science. This essay explores how agentic pipelines can assist earthquake signal triage, literature review, and reproducible research workflows.
hero_caption: A conceptual map from waveform ingestion to scientific interpretation.
hero_image_note: Use a research-oriented composition that suggests waveform processing and workflow stages; avoid disaster imagery or sensational earthquake photos.
